title: Community Guidelines
intro: By using Tariq Islam, you agree to follow these guidelines to keep the community safe and respectful.

respect.title: Respect & Safety
items: No harassment, hate speech, bullying, or threats.
No explicit sexual content or exploitation.

content.title: Content Standards
items: Do not post content that promotes violence, extremism, or hate.
Do not share illegal content or instructions for wrongdoing.
Respect Islamic values and keep discussions appropriate.

enforcement.title: Enforcement
enforcement.body: Violations may result in warnings, content removal, suspension, or permanent bans.
